titleStmt.title: SII 17.703: original edition by K. G. Krishnan
No. 703. (A.R. No. 646 of 1904.) RĀMAGIRI, TIRUVALLUR TALUK, CHINGLEPUT DISTRICT.

summary.p: On the west wall of the Bhairava shrine in the Vālīśvara temple.
The details of date viz., Karkaṭaka 14, śu. 10, Aṉiḻam, Thursday, correspond regularly to 1231 A.D., July 10, Thursday, ·65, ·97.

This inscription records the gift of 32 cows, left in the hands of the śivabrāhmaṇas of the temple by Kuḷattuḻāṉ Ammai Appaṉ alias Villavarāyaṉ of Kuṉṟai, for burning a perpetual lamp to the deity Tirukkārikarai-uḍaiyār of Niṉṟaiyūr-nāḍu in Kuṉṟavattana-kōṭṭam, in Jayaṅgoṇḍaśōḻa-maṇḍalam.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīirājairājatevarkku yāṇṭu patiṉāṟāvatu kaṟkaṭaka nāyaṟṟu patiṉālānti
yatiyāṉa viyāḻakkiḻamai pūrvva pakṣattu daśamiyum Aṉiḻamumāṉa vaṉṟu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻa maṇṭa
lattuk kuṉṟavattaṉak koṭṭattu niṉṟaiyūr nāṭṭu Āḷuṭaiyār tirukkārikkarai Uṭai yārkku
kuṉṟaiyiṟ kuḷattuḻāṉ Ammai Appaṉāṉa villavarāyaṉeṉ Iṉṉāyaṉāṟku viṭṭa tirinun
tāviḷakku Oṉṟukku viṭṭa pacu muppattiraṇṭum yikkoyilil kāṇi Uṭaiya civappirāma ṇaṉ Āṇṭāṉ paṭ
ṭaṉum Aṉpaṉāyakapaṭṭaṉum Āṭkoṇṭa piḷḷaiyum mivaṉ tampi Aṉpaṉāyakanum pūcāla paṭṭaṉum
Ivaṉ tampi yum Āḻvāṉ paṭṭaṉ tiruvāṇṭaiyum Ippacu muppatti raṇṭum Upaiya
mākak kaikkoṇṭu Ivviḷakku Oṉṟu caṉtirātittavarai Erikka kaṭavomākak kaikko
ṇṭom Ivvaṉaivom .
Digital edition of SII 17.703 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Emmanuel Francis.
